papers.title: FRB Searches with the Irish LOFAR Station
papers.summary: Here we report null results in the search for radio emission below $200$~MHz from six known fast radio burst sources. The observations reported here were taken using the Irish LOFAR station's high-band antennas over the course of 2020, 2021 and 2022; the cumulative observing time was $218$~h.
